purpose: Machine-readable contract for infrastructure profiles consumed by provider-backed benchmark cycles.
governanceRules: Every benchmark cycle must reference exactly one infrastructureProfileId.
Provider-backed profiles must declare providerId=proxmox-k3s unless another provider is explicitly introduced.
Identical Kubernetes node names across profiles do not imply equivalent infrastructure.
Historical profiles must remain distinct from provider-backed profiles.
Resource and node-count variation profiles should vary one principal infrastructure dimension at a time.
Provider-backed infrastructure profiles should include providerBindingId and providerBindingPath.
Provider-specific cluster YAML paths must be resolved through provider bindings rather than hard-coded directly in execution logic.
Every provider-backed infrastructure profile must declare a lifecyclePolicyId and lifecyclePolicyPath.
Lifecycle policy defaults may be overridden by cycle profiles only when the override is explicit and recorded in a lifecycle manifest.
Resource-variation and node-count profiles should prefer ephemeral lifecycle policies when clean infrastructure comparisons are required.
Infrastructure profiles must document physical-host consolidation when declared worker nodes outnumber available distinct Proxmox hosts.
Provider bindings and provider cluster YAML files must be consistent with the Proxmox host materialization declared by the infrastructure profile.
